articles.title: JD and Usha Vance welcome a baby boy, the first child born to a sitting VP in more than 150 years - PBS
articles.description: The Republican vice president’s growing family is in keeping with his passionate advocacy for Americans to have more children.
articles.content:
WASHINGTON (AP) Vice President JD Vance and his wife, second lady Usha Vance, on Sunday announced the birth of their fourth child, the first born to a sitting vice president in more than 150 years.
